name: Marco
subject: Before kickoff
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44132658:6TE2UkLrN:m:1:1349778030:17A80BAA0326DEB791346D481C1C5355:r)
---
| | | | Peter, I wanted to send you this quick message before the NFL games kick off today: We're just a few days away from the latest major fundraising deadline of this campaign and we're hoping you'll help out the team. _**[Click here to donate $10, $20, or even $50 right now and help us beat our participation goal before the week even gets started!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44132659:6TE2UkLrN:m:1:1349778030:17A80BAA0326DEB791346D481C1C5355:r)**_ Why is participation important? When I played football, I could only do so much for the team if the team didn't all share the same goal. And like I tell my sons, the lessons you learn in football apply to life (and campaigns). This fundraising report plays a critical role in setting the pace and tone for the rest of the fall. Thanks for being a part of the team! \-- Marco Rubio
---
| | | | | [**DONATE** ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/44132659:6TE2UkLrN:m:1:1349778030:17A80BAA0326DEB791346D481C1C5355:r)
---
| | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
---

name: Rand Paul
subject: here's why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Fellow Conservative:

I'll be direct and to the point.

In just a moment I'm going to ask you to chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my End of Quarter Fundraising Push.

I'm being direct with you because the truth is, money really is that important. It's a big deal.

Lack of funding is the primary reason two Republican candidates have dropped out of the race in the past few weeks.

Of course, my campaign is built for the long haul. My recent victory in the Mackinac Island Republican Leadership Conference straw poll proves that our organization and grassroots force is unmatched.

But even grassroots-driven campaigns require money. There are offices, staff, phone banks, yard signs, materials, campaign travel, and many of the other expenses necessary for a campaign to function.

And since the Washington Machine's gatekeeper's in the press are attempting to silence my campaign and stamp out my liberty message, I need even more resources to bust through their wall and take my message directly to the voters.

TV, Internet, and radio ads. Email and direct mail to targeted voters across the country. It all adds up.

That's why I told you I was going to ask you to chip in a contribution of $20.16. Those primary operations are essential to my campaign.

**[So today, Fellow Conservative, can I count on you to please chip in a contribution of $20.16 to my End of the Quarter fundraising push](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)**?

The upcoming September 30th FEC End of Quarter Fundraising Period is by far the most important of my campaign.

If you're with me in this fight for the long haul to defeat the Washington Machine and take our country back, **[I need you to chip in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)**.

But if $20.16 is just too much at this time, I hope you'll consider contributing $15, $10 -- even $5.

Every dollar you can afford to donate right now is critical.

**[So please, Fellow Conservative, let me know you're still with me in this fight by chipping in a contribution today](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)**.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3&sr=rhf092715a1")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **
---

| [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650399:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650400:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650401:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650402:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650398:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650403:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650404:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30650405:Wnj2MMmdN:m:1:879035888:04A40D9BB14C8F0355B232BFC3D432D7:r)

name: Team Katie
subject: Your supporter record
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
---
Friend --

With our first FEC reporting deadline just around the corner, it's all hands on deck.

_The Hill_ has ranked Pat Toomey as one of the nation's "most vulnerable senators" \-- and Toomey's special interest friends must be shaking in their boots that he won't be back in Washington to fight for their extreme agenda. After all, deep-pocketed donors like the Koch brothers have already spent millions in Pennsylvania trying to repair Toomey's failed record -- and the election is still _more than a year away!_

**If we are going to keep pace with Toomey and his big money donors, we need every one of Katie 's grassroots supporters to chip in right now.**

**[Pitch in to Katie's campaign today. Our first big FEC deadline is fast approaching and meeting our goal is the best way to show that Katie has the grassroots support to win in 2016.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3245949640217985024?refcode=e20150927u&amount=15)**

| **Supporter Record** **Supporter ID:** VN9J1YN7Q16
**Email Address:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**[Suggested support:](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3245949640217985024?refcode=e20150927u&amount=15)** $10 ([**Donate now >>**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3245949640217985024?refcode=e20150927u&amount=15))
---

The stakes are high. One candidate in this race sides with special interests to defund Planned Parenthood, opposes raising the minimum wage, and wants to end Medicare as we know it. Our candidate is fighting for affordable healthcare, a strong public education system, and bringing more good jobs back to Pennsylvania.

**Whose side are you on?**

**[Chip in $10 today to show your support for Katie and help us reach our goal of raising $10,000 before our first FEC deadline.](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3245949640217985024?refcode=e20150927u&amount=15)**

Thank you,

Team Katie
| [**DONATE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3245949640217985024?refcode=e20150927u&amount=15)
---
| | Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
---
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1110475858943934464/-3318007234255912960).

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: John Weaver, Chief Strategist
subject: See this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kasich For America, www
body:
[](www.JohnKasich.com)

Peter, did you see Governor John Kasich on Face The Nation this morning? He was great. Not only has Governor Kasich TALKED about reforming and fixing our government, he's ACTUALLY DONE IT.

[](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30652239:sSZdZMmuN:m:1:958431888:63A3921F01B1C65F4DF9E7750978B540:r)

Our nation needs more than talk, we need results. **Governor Kasich will deliver FOR US**.

[We need your support to get him to the White House](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30652240:sSZdZMmuN:m:1:958431888:63A3921F01B1C65F4DF9E7750978B540:r).

A new NBC national poll came out this morning that showed Governor Kasich doubling his support and only one point behind Jeb Bush. [We need your support right now in order to have the resources to continue to compete](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30652240:sSZdZMmuN:m:1:958431888:63A3921F01B1C65F4DF9E7750978B540:r).

We've seen that when we have the ability to share our message the voters respond. Now we need to make sure we can continue to spread Governor Kasich's record of balancing budgets, lowering taxes, a stronger national defense and creating jobs. **We can win this race with your support**. [Can you chip in right now?](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30652240:sSZdZMmuN:m:1:958431888:63A3921F01B1C65F4DF9E7750978B540:r)

[

](http://email.sermodigital.com/ct/30652241:sSZdZMmuN:m:1:958431888:63A3921F01B1C65F4DF9E7750978B540:r)
Thank you for all that you're doing to help. Let's win!

**John Weaver
**Chief Strategist

name: Congressman Thomas Massie
subject: Time is running out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative:

I know what it's like to be under fire from the Washington Machine's attack dogs.

And it's not fun.

During my 2012 re-election campaign, the special interest lobby threatened to come after me with guns blazing for daring to oppose their statist agenda in Congress.

But both Rand Paul and his dad, Ron, came to my defense -- publicly endorsing my re-election campaign.

As a result, the Washington Machine backed down and I was re-elected to Congress for another term.

**[Will you join me in Standing with Rand by chipping in a contribution of $20.16 before the September 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30652010:syzJZMmCN:m:1:879035888:2E06CE1F13DDF5F8AB4356FE951370E0:r)**?

Today it's Rand who's being attacked for taking a principled stand.

And he's under fire from the entire Washington Machine.

Rand is a true champion of Liberty, and he could really use your generous support at this critical stage of the game.

I know you understand what's at stake.

But the clock is ticking. And time is running out to join Rand in his corner.

**[So please chip in a contribution of $20.16 before the September 30th deadline](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30652010:syzJZMmCN:m:1:879035888:2E06CE1F13DDF5F8AB4356FE951370E0:r)**.

Thank you in advance for all you do for the cause of Liberty.

| ****[ ** dpwillis67@gmail.com ** ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30652010:syzJZMmCN:m:1:879035888:2E06CE1F13DDF5F8AB4356FE951370E0:r "https://secure.randpaul.com/?q3&sr=rhf092715b")
**CONTRIBUTED TO END OF QUARTER PUSH?**
**## NO DONATION ##** ** **

name: Patrick Murphy
subject: Fwd: really bad news (Tea Party)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friends,

Josh is absolutely right -- with Boehner gone and the Tea Party rising in prominence, taking back the Senate is critical. **We could be the race that determines whether Democrats take control or the Tea Party completely takes over Washington.**

The Kochs and Rove want me out of this race. The Tea Party wants me out, too. _How hard we can fight back is up to you._

[**Make a contribution toward our $50,000 FEC goal before the deadline on Wednesday. Give $5 or more tonight.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20aa/738133e4/3a84e063/7f8c4453/3205830879/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150926pm?refcode=pme150926pm_m&recurring=true")

Thanks.

Patrick

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Josh Wolf
Date: Sat, Sep 26, 2015
Subject: really bad news (Tea Party) Friends,

The Tea Party is staging a coup in the House. Now, if they take over the Speaker's office when John Boehner retires, they could destroy middle class Americans. The stakes for winning this race could not be higher.

**And now it looks like Karl Rove 's trying to barge into the Florida Senate race to win more Tea Party seats.**

A headline in the _Sunshine State News_ says: _" Patrick Murphy, Karl Rove PAC tangle in race to replace Marco Rubio."_ And it's up to us to make sure this is a "tangle" Karl Rove will lose.

[**We 're still short of our $50,000 goal, with just 4 days to go before the end of the FEC quarter. Make a contribution right now.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20aa/738133e4/3a84e063/7f8c4453/3205830879/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150926pm?refcode=pme150926pm_m&recurring=true")

Karl Rove is a long-time Republican strategist. Rove's group getting involved in Florida is a big indicator of what we already knew -- _**this is a huge race that could decide control of the Senate.**_

And with the Tea Party possibly gaining more power than ever before, we can't afford to let these attacks go unanswered. We NEED Patrick in the Senate.

[**Help us respond by reaching our $50,000 FEC goal before the deadline next Wednesday. Give what you can today.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20aa/738133e4/3a84e063/7f8c4453/3205830879/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150926pm?refcode=pme150926pm_m&recurring=true")

I cannot overstate how important it is we reach this goal.

We'll keep you updated on our progress. In the meantime -- thanks for all of your help.

Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20aa/738133e4/3a84e063/7f8c444c/3205830879/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---

Now, if they take over the Speaker's office when John Boehner retires, they could destroy middle class Americans. The stakes for winning this race could not be higher. And now it looks like Karl Rove 's trying to barge into the Florida Senate race to win more Tea Party seats. A headline in the Sunshine State News says: " Patrick Murphy, Karl Rove PAC tangle in race to replace Marco Rubio." And it's up to us to make sure this is a "tangle" Karl Rove will lose. "" Karl Rove is a long-time Republican strategist. Rove's group getting involved in Florida is a big indicator of what we already knew -- this is a huge race that could decide control of the Senate. And with the Tea Party possibly gaining more power than ever before, we can't afford to let these attacks go unanswered. We NEED Patrick in the Senate. "" I cannot overstate how important it is we reach this goal. We'll keep you updated on our progress. In the meantime -- thanks for all of your help. Josh | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | ""

name: Columba Bush
subject: Here’s what I know
body:
Friend,

I want Americans to get to know the Jeb I know and love.

He's a loving husband, father, grandfather and true leader. When we met, he says it was love at first sight. My first observation was how tall he was, but we've been married now for 41 years.

In those 41 years, it's always been clear that Jeb's a public servant at heart who is passionate about making a difference in people's lives.

He's a man of principle and the hardest worker I know. He always puts others first, and I know he'll put the country first as president.

Those are just some of the things I love about Jeb. **[But Friend, no one is going to see that side of him if he misses his critical End of Quarter fundraising goal of $200,000.](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/dshkzrjwsmcfgbgtfrnksflbjjflwbzwkrdrcwbtjcmd_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

Jeb's the love of my life, and I want to see him succeed. But he can't do it alone, he needs the help of people like you to make that happen.

**Please chip in $100, $50, $25 or whatever you can afford to help Jeb meet his big fundraising deadline Wednesday at midnight:[Jeb2016.com/September-Supporter/](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/pdqtwyvkdlmbfgfhbystdbrgvvbrkgwktycymkghvmld_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)**

I love my husband, and I know the country is going to love him, too.

Thank you for all your prayers and support,

Columba

[](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/cqtrvgmzqlcfhshtfgnrqfksmmfkzsvzrgjgczstmclm_xbjrrscg.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=4115&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I want to see your name on this list
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
Can I count on you? | Friend --

I’ve always thought of an end-of-quarter fundraising report as an announcement of who’s on our team. It’s when this campaign says to the world, “Here’s who we are, and here’s what we stand for.” Chip in $1 today to make sure you’re on our list. | | [** Donate $1**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjM2MDk4NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyOTE0OTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
---

Jeb Bush’s team is made of millionaires and billionaires, and he wants to give them big tax cuts just like his brother did. Donald Trump is the only person on his team, and, well, let’s just say it’s not hard to figure out who he cares about most.

Our team is different. We’re thousands of Americans coming together to build an economy and a country that works for every family.

**Donate $1 or more before September 30th and show the world you’re on this team:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/deadline/**](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=MjM2MDk4NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyOTE0OTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)

I'm so glad you're a part of this.

Thanks,

Hillary

**Did someone forward this email to you?[Add your name here to get more like it!](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=MjM2MDk4NTAS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjQyOTE0OTYzS0&mt=1&rt=0)** | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.

name: Ron Paul
subject: ## Enemy of the State ##
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

It's no secret.

The national media and the establishment of both parties would love nothing more than to drive a stake through the heart of our Liberty Movement and stop my son, Rand, at all costs.

That's why, with the September 30th fundraising deadline rapidly approaching, Rand needs the support of our grassroots army of liberty lovers now more than ever.

**[Can I count on you to"Stand with Rand" by chipping in a generous contribution of $20.16 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)**?

The gatekeepers in the press are going all-out to destroy Rand just like they tried to destroy me.

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)

And if they succeed, they'll go on to even more spending, spying, welfare and warfare in Washington, D.C.

I was able to weather the media's viciousness because I had patriots like you at my side.

Because good folks like you stood with me, the Washington Machine failed. And our Liberty Movement continues to grow.

But unlike other candidates, Rand isn't depending on Wall Street fat-cats and banksters who want more special treatment, bailouts and stimulus packages to bankroll his candidacy.
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
Rand is depending on patriots like you who are willing to fight to take our country back.

Fellow Conservative, this is by far the most important fundraising deadline of Rand's entire campaign.

And every dollar is critical.

**[So please agree to make your most generous contribution of $20.16 to help Rand fight back against the Washington Machine's smears](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)**.

Rand is the ONLY one in the race who is standing up for your Liberty across the board.

And I believe he's our best hope to restore liberty, limited government and the Bill of Rights and finally end the big spending status quo in Washington, D.C.

I'm proud to say I "Stand with Rand."

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)

And today I hope you'll join me by **[chipping in a contribution of $20.16](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)** to Rand's End of the Quarter Fundraising Push immediately.

Thank you in advance for your support.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653226:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653227:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653228:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653229:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)

For Liberty,

Ron Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653225:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653230:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653231:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/30653232:sQnFtMmsN:m:1:879035888:63289A946210EFC04190414F9DDDD1C0:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 16, 2015.

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Heard of Patrick? The Koch Brothers have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Friend,

I'd like to introduce you to Patrick Murphy. He's a Congressman from Florida running a tough race for U.S. Senate this cycle.

You may not have heard of Patrick's campaign yet, but I can assure you, the Koch brothers and their Republican allies have already taken notice. Earlier this month, the Kochs' group, Americans for Prosperity, ran a full-page Op-Ed attacking Patrick for opposing _Citizens United_.

Special interest groups spent more than $40 million against me -- one of the most expensive races in the country. And I can tell you who one of their top targets will be this year:

Patrick.

[_**I want to make sure Patrick has the resources he needs to fight back. Before the end of this FEC quarter, show Patrick what our grassroots network is made of. Contribute $5 or more to help Patrick.**_](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ab/738133e4/3ab95afe/7f8c7f8e/3539392388/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150924s?refcode=pme150924s_m&recurring=true")

There's a reason AFP is going up against Patrick so early in the cycle. **It 's because they know if he's elected, he'll fight back against their special interest, anti-middle class agenda.**

The Kochs and their outside interests want to make this race a showdown of _Citizens United_ vs. our citizen movement. [**And who wins is going to depend on supporters like you, helping power Patrick and his organization.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ab/738133e4/3ab95afe/7f8c7f8e/3539392388/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150924s?refcode=pme150924s_m&recurring=true")

Patrick is the kind of person I want to work with in the Senate. He's a tireless advocate for the middle class, and he has a track record of doing what's right for his district.

[**The end of the FEC quarter is coming up fast. Give $5 or whatever you can to help Patrick before September 30th.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ab/738133e4/3ab95afe/7f8c7f8e/3539392388/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme150924s?refcode=pme150924s_m&recurring=true")

Thank you.

Sherrod | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ab/738133e4/3ab95afe/7f8c7f8f/3539392388/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae20ab/738133e4/3ab95afe/7f8c7f88/3539392388/VEsD/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/unsubscribe").

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

All content (C) 2015 Friends of Patrick Murphy, All Rights Reserved
